prompt: Please do the task stated in `/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2_generation_prompts.md`, where the TASK_ID is `df9fd884`.
codex_response:
Implemented the ARC2 package for `df9fd884`. The rule is: keep the two opposite yellow 2-row U-frames fixed, remove the lone non-yellow object, and repaint that object bottom-aligned in the gap columns of the upper yellow frame on the opposite side. The summary hint was used as a sanity check, not discarded; it matched the official examples closely enough, so no `notes.md` was needed. No new DSL primitive was added.

The verifier is in [verifier.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_df9fd884/verifier.py#L4), the generator in [generator.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_df9fd884/generator.py#L4), and the package wiring in [__init__.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_df9fd884/__init__.py#L1). The generator stays close to the official family by using 8x8 and 9x9 square grids, opposite yellow U-frames with gap width 1 or 2, and small connected single-color motifs whose width matches the frame gap, placed above the lower frame and moved to the bottom on the opposite side.

Validation passed end to end: `4/4` official examples, `1000/1000` generated examples, and I opened a generated preview sheet to sanity-check the visuals. Artifacts are at [task.json](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/df9fd884/task.json), [originals.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/df9fd884/previews/originals.png), [preview_01.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/df9fd884/previews/preview_01.png), [preview_02.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/df9fd884/previews/preview_02.png), and [preview_03.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/df9fd884/previews/preview_03.png).
